title: The Dormitory
description: A small custom pack for my friends!
body:
# Background
The Dormitory began as a small vanilla server for a few friends, and eventually expanded to include a few mods (Create and a few QoL things). Now that more friends are starting to join, I figured it would be easier for me to publish a simple launcher-compatible modpack instead of telling them all individually how to install everything. 

# Future plans
Depending on how long this keeps going, I may add new mods in the future and do more backend work to further simplify things for my future self!

## Disclaimer
Full credit to all the original makers of these mods, I have neither created nor modified them in any way
